subcodes.first_line: O blessed souls! Your letter was received. It was not a letter - it was a vessel of musk from the gazelles of oneness, for its fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه نامه شما رسید نامه نبود نافه مشک غزالان بر وحدت بود زیرا رائحه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
